title: The Silk Road
subtitle: Eurasian trade network, 2nd c. BCE - 15th c. CE
description: A route-by-route look at the commercial and cultural exchange linking China, Central Asia, Persia, and the eastern Mediterranean.

title: Napoleon's Russian Campaign
subtitle: Summer 1812 - winter retreat
description: The Grande Armee drives toward Moscow, wins ruinous battles, and collapses on the road home.

title: Opening of WWII in Europe
subtitle: September 1939 - May 1940
description: Blitzkrieg redraws the map of Europe from Poland to the Channel in a matter of months.

title: The Roman Empire
subtitle: From republic to imperial fracture
description: Rome rises from a city on the Tiber to a Mediterranean empire and leaves the west behind in late antiquity.
